mapper.select: SELECT id, name, description, price, stock, category, image_url, status, create_time, update_time FROM product WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product (name, description, price, stock, category, image_url, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{category}, #{imageUrl}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
